label: Possession
description: A starting item given to pawns with this backstory. Loaded from keyed child elements via LoadDataFromXmlCustom: element name is the ThingDef defName, text is an IntRange count (defaults to 1~1 when omitted). Entries may carry MayRequire or MayRequireAnyOf attributes.

key.label: Thing
key.description: ThingDef of the item to give.

value.label: Count
value.description: Integer range for the quantity of this item given at spawn. Defaults to 1~1 when the child element has no text content.
